subject: PS_oc Self-Diagnostic Implementation Approval
description: Approval of PS_oc self-diagnostic proposal with 7 amendments from A42 advisory review. Authorizes OpenClaw to implement F_conv, rho_wt, and Lyapunov trajectory tracking as parallel observational metrics in the governed-agent public repository.

amendments.title: Separate Tracks First
amendments.requirement: F_conv and F_tool as parallel independent metrics. No harmonic mean for 90 days.

amendments.title: 14-Day Non-Reported Baseline
amendments.requirement: F_conv invisible to agent for 14 days. Hawthorne control.

amendments.title: Short Response Handling
amendments.requirement: Responses under 20 words not scored as 1.0. Flag as short or impute EWMA.

amendments.title: PA Centroid Versioning
amendments.requirement: Every record includes PA config hash. PA changes invalidate comparability.

amendments.title: Datasheet
amendments.requirement: Published before first record. Gebru requirement.

amendments.title: Post-Hoc Only
amendments.requirement: F_conv computed after response delivered. Structural constraint.

amendments.title: Anti-Optimization Constraint
amendments.requirement: SOUL.md entry against optimizing language for cosine similarity.

prerequisite: Datasheet published before first F_conv record
